title: Finance Manager
description:
We are looking for an experienced Finance & Operations Manager to lead our accounting team, manage financial planning, strengthen internal controls, and support business operations across the organization. The role requires strong leadership, financial expertise, and the ability to work closely with senior management and external stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage the accounts/finance team; ensure timely and accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reporting.
  • Work closely with Division Heads and the Managing Director on budgeting, forecasting, and cashflow planning.
  • Oversee project financials including contract terms, cost management, and coordination with project teams.
  • Resolve operational issues to ensure smooth team performance.
  • Manage audit and tax matters; liaise with auditors and tax agents to ensure full compliance.
  • Ensure adherence to regulatory requirements and internal control policies.
  • Review, improve, and implement workflows, internal processes, and policies for better efficiency.
  • Provide operational support including tender review, business development assistance, and BG/LC applications.
  • Consolidate and analyze data required for management reporting.
  • Partner with internal business units and senior management on strategic and operational decisions.
  • Manage communications and documentation with external stakeholders such as banks, corporate secretaries, auditors, tax agents, and government agencies.

Requirements

  • Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (professional certifications a plus).
  • Strong experience in financial reporting, budgeting, cashflow planning, and audit compliance.
  • Excellent leadership, problem‑solving, and communication skills.
  • Proven ability to streamline processes and improve operational efficiency.
  • Comfortable working with cross‑functional teams and external stakeholders.

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in 1978 and based in Singapore, Hitachi Aqua-Tech Engineering Pte. Ltd. stands out in the water treatment industry by offering full EPC capabilities across a wide range of projects. With a strong focus on reverse osmosis (RO) and demineralization systems, we are a complete system builder equipped with comprehensive engineering capabilities and in-house manufacturing facilities.

Hitachi Aqua-Tech water treatment systems are installed globally in various industries ranging from food processing, health care, cogeneration plants, electronics, marine, military, FPSO, aviation, to hotels and resorts.
postedCompany.name: HITACHI AQUA-TECH ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
